title: Turn off Item Updates generated by Automations
excerpt: We’d like to turn off Item Updates generated by Automations or automated emails. This creates a lot of clutter when we wish to view Updates on an item since most of our Automations are not critical Updates.

posts.author: premierprep (Zach Goldstein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screen Shot 2023-07-21 at 2.24.59 PM660×1520 109 KB

We’d like to turn off Item Updates generated by Automations or automated emails. This creates a lot of clutter when we wish to view Updates on an item since most of our Automations are not critical Updates.
